The '''Red Hand''' was a criminal organization on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] that undertook a series of political assassinations during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They made their way around the world-city using the underground sewer network and followed the [[Code of the Streets]]. [[Ayo Morota]] was its leader, and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] assigned [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] to infiltrate it. He killed every individual of their organization who confronted him.
